provenance.notes: Consulted before flipping settings-panel passes=true; triggers: claim-done, security-touching (credential delete), new-public-api (logout_account command). Inspected task contract, draft evidence bundle, attested check sidecars, and the architecture + security reviewer artifacts.

diffCoverage.notes: Evidence changed source/config files are the four reviewed here; the remaining changed files (SettingsDialog.svelte, RailNav.svelte, +page.svelte, +layout.svelte) are ui wiring with no layer/boundary impact.

findings.evidence: Four attested checks are present and pass with hashed stdout/stderr sidecars: lint (cargo clippy -D warnings), typecheck (svelte-check 0/0), frontend.build (vite build), tests (cargo test command:: 6 passed). Each binds to a contract acceptance id (lint/typecheck/build/tests). The contract's doneRequires (lint, tests, review, evidence-bundle) are each satisfied by a passing check or reviewer set.

Both required role reviewers pass with diff coverage = 1 over the changed source/config files. security-reviewer carries auth-session-boundary + secret-handling and confirms logout_account never moves a credential across IPC; architecture-reviewer carries layering and confirms the command depends only backward on session + store. The one residual (local forget, no server-side revocation) is a documented low-severity design choice, not a blocker.

summary: settings-panel is honestly done. The bottom-rail gear now opens a real Settings dialog (was a no-op). The only new core surface, logout_account, is correctly layered and keeps the credential trust boundary intact (non-secret accountId in, encrypted credential deleted via CASCADE, keychain master key preserved, nothing logged). Evidence is fully attested (lint/typecheck/build/tests green) with acceptance bindings, and the required architecture + security reviewers pass with full diff coverage. The live GUI smoke (theme persistence across relaunch + logout-to-QR-gate) was confirmed by the user in-session. Pass.
